ohm:node/2096330437.reason: SFPL states the new Bayview Library opened February 23, 2013; the OHM value 1900-02-29 is not a valid calendar date.

ohm:node/2108838779.reason: The district takes its historical origin from Mission San Francisco de Asís, founded in 1776; the OHM record links this provenance but supplies no date.
